CustomField.description: Provenance of this document draft. AI-Generated = fully machine-authored by NEPA_EIS_Section_Assembler; Human-Authored = entirely written by staff; AI-Assisted = AI-generated draft subsequently edited by a human. Required for OMB M-24-10 AI use disclosure. AI-Generated documents must be reviewed by a Subject Matter Expert before publication.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Who authored this document. AI-Generated drafts require SME review and sign-off before inclusion in the administrative record.
CustomField.label: Draft Source
